case_title: GREGORY H. BLAINE VS. HIMA A. MENON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAINE, GREGORY H. , AGENT OF THE BLAINE 1977 REVOCABLE TRUST
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MENON, HIMA A. , AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF DAVID P WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 73708473) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAINE, GREGORY H. , AGENT OF THE BLAINE 1977 REVOCABLE TRUST

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLAINE, GREGORY H. , AGENT OF THE BLAINE 1977 REVOCABLE TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENON, HIMA A. , AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2290 FRANCISCO STREET, UNIT NUMBER 204, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94123, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 73708473)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAINE, GREGORY H. , AGENT OF THE BLAINE 1977 REVOCABLE TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT MENON, HIMA A. , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 73708473) AS TO DEFENDANT MENON, HIMA A. , AN INDIVIDUAL
